rationale: The doc covers the requested artifact with quantitative claims but provides no baseline measurements, making the percentages unverifiable. Structure is ad-hoc (no goals/invariants/acceptance criteria) and the Mathlib module cross-reference is unverified.
rubric_evidence: a **40% reduction** in incremental build time and a **60% reduction** in dependent module re-compilation
Memory usage dropped by **25%**, and the elaborator now spends **3x less time** on type-class resolution
